'''Gellus''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] senior civil servant in Fleet Supply on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

When [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] of the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] tried to procure more supplies for [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] on the front lines during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], Gellus was the civil servant who Solo spoke to. Since Solo was not a member of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]], she told him he had to wait until he had authorization from someone higher up, such as [[Supreme Commander]] [[Cha Niathal]], to request procurement.<ref name="Sacrifice" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
